examples: He ate a large bowlful of cereal.
I had a mixed salad – a huge bowlful for $3.20.
They ate a large bowlful of cereal.
It took a year to muster an Arab counter-strike, but on October 24th a squadron of Lebanese chefs cooked up a bunker-busting bowlful that weighed in at over 2, 000kg.
Pre-cook it for at least two hours. (Fill a stockpot with water, add lemon juice, some salt and turn on the gas.) A savory, warming bowlful proves the sumptuous ends justify the malodorous means.
